name: briefing-toolkit
description: Daily read-only morning brief over connected MCP tools (Slack/Asana/Notion). ⚠️ Claude Code CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Read-only cross-tool morning brief over Slack / Asana / Notion
interface.longDescription: Use briefing-toolkit's daily-brief skill to generate today's cross-tool morning brief — schedule, action-required items, project status, and what's upcoming — pulled from connected MCP tools with source links back to each item. Includes a zero-omission action table that accumulates day over day. Read-only; never mutates the source tools.
defaultPrompt: What needs my attention across Slack and Asana today?
Summarize my schedule and open action items.
